items.text:
**CASTING CALL — FILMING SATURDAY, APRIL 25TH IN VANCOUVER**

Fourthframe Media is casting for our YouTube social experiment series — unscripted episodes where real people debate, deceive, and compete for a cash prize.

If you've seen Jubilee on YouTube, you know the vibe. We're building something like that right here in Vancouver.

**We're shooting 4 episodes this Saturday and need people for:**
1. 🥩 **6 Vegans vs 1 Secret Meat Eater** — Are you vegan? Or can you fake it? One meat-eater hides among real vegans. If the group catches them, they split the prize. If the liar survives, they take it all.
2. 💰 **Can We Match Your Salary to Your Face?** — People guess each other's income based on first impressions and short conversations. How much does appearance really say about what you earn?
3. 🔀 **Who Is Not a Girl?** — Judges have conversations with contestants without seeing them and decide who's a girl and who's not. Don't worry about your voice; energy and persuasion are your only tools.
4. 💔 **Who Has It Harder — Men or Women?** — An honest, emotional conversation between men and women about the struggles each side faces. No financial debates. Just real talk.

**Details:** 
Location📍: Vancouver, BC 
Date 📅: Saturday, April 25th, 2026 

**🎥 This is volunteer-based. Winners take home a cash prize. **
**🙅 No acting experience needed — just be yourself and bring energy.**

**Apply here:** [https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting](https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting)

Follow us on YouTube/Instagram/TikTok to see our latest episodes.

Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia](https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia)
YouTube: [https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia](https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia)
TikTok: [https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2](https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2)

Know someone who'd be perfect? Tag them or share this post.

#vancouver #socialexperiment #4thframemedia #JubileeStyle #RealVsFake #jubilee

items.text:
Casting Asian Actors for some Proof-of-Concept scenes I'm shooting in the last week of April.

I'm putting together an Asian street gang (ie. Chinese, Korean, Japanese) project and am wanting to shoot a few short scenes for it. Basically guys and girls who are lounging around the streets of Vancouver, up to no good....

Inspiration are the Hong Kong triad films starring Andy Lau from the 1990's, would love to cast an Andy Lau type lead actor and some female gang leads. Bonus if the actor can speak Cantonese although this is not important.

The two character types are:

• Andy - 20's, independent, street smarts, living life the way he wants.

• Maggie - 20's, beautiful and either innocent or a gangster girl with a headstrong personality.

This is partly proof-of-concept, partly experimental and is on a volunteer basis but you will get footage for your reel.

Don't have exact dates yet but shooting will be between April 22nd to 27th.

Open to union and non-union actors.

If interested, please email me several professional photos (including one headshot and one full length photo) and resume to castingproject604@gmail.comNOSPAM. If you have video, send that along as well.

Thanks for reading.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, motorcycle and text that says 'Casting Asian Actors East Asian, Chinese, Korean, etc... RG500 for some scenes :วารี'

topComments.text: Planning to start shooting something this week. There has been a lot of women who submitted but not a lot of men. Gentlmen, this is your chance to be bad-azz!

items.text:
# **DENIM (Short Film)**

**Surreal Road Drama**

**Director/Writer:** Rob Asaro
**Union Status:** SAG-AFTRA Micro-Budget Agreement * *
**Shoot Location:** New York, New Jersey, Colorado
**Shoot Dates:** June 27-28-29 (NY/NJ) 

Production is also seeking **background/local NJ talent**.
## **PRINCIPAL ROLES**
**KURT:  SUPPORTING **

**Male | 40s | Any Ethnicity**

Motel clerk. Antagonist. Strange, unsettling, forced friendliness. Alternates between cheerful hospitality and unsettling intensity. Owns a bearded dragon and practices archery. Comic and threatening at once. Must feel psychologically real. 2 days.

**JUNIPER:  SUPPORTING **

**Female | 20s–early 30s | Any Ethnicity**

Young artist heading east toward a new life. Open, perceptive, artistic, lived-in, emotionally present. Represents possibility, youth, and forward motion.  1 day.

**BACKGROUND / LOCAL NORTH JERSEY TALENT**

Production is also seeking background performers and local hires as farm customers.

All ages 18+, genders, and ethnicities are encouraged to submit.
## **SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit to [LostintheLightProductions@gmail.com](mailto:LostintheLightProductions@gmail.com) with SUBJECT HEADING - DENIM/ ACTOR SUBMISSION FOR *NAME OF PART:*

* Headshot
* Resume
* **Reel ***** (for speaking parts) **
* Current location.

Casting Call !!!
Looking for a talented actress for an upcoming music video shoot.

📍 Shoot Duration: 1 day

📅 When: Weekday (exact date to be confirmed)

🎥 Location: Various locations in London 

🎭 Age Group - 21–30

We’re seeking someone confident on camera with strong expressions and on-screen presence. Previous acting or modeling experience is a plus, but not required.

If you’re interested (or know someone who might be), please DM me with your portfolio, photos, or a short intro. 

OR 

email - dhlondonmotionpictures@gmail.com

Let’s create something amazing together! ✨

items.text:
Cześć! 👋

🎭 Jesteś aktorem lub przygotowujesz się do roli w języku angielskim?
Chcesz brzmieć naturalnie, pewnie i autentycznie na scenie lub przed kamerą? Świetnie trafiłeś!

Oferuję indywidualne korepetycje z języka angielskiego, specjalnie dopasowane do potrzeb aktorów, studentów szkół teatralnych oraz osób pracujących z tekstem – niezależnie od poziomu zaawansowania.

Jestem native speakerem z USA 🇺🇸 i od ponad 5 lat uczę angielskiego. Dodatkowo mam doświadczenie w pracy z aktorami – pomagam im:
🎬 przygotować się do ról anglojęzycznych
🎭 pracować nad wymową, akcentem i intonacją
🗣️ naturalnie interpretować dialogi i monologi
📖 analizować teksty sceniczne w języku angielskim
💬 przełamywać barierę językową w występach na żywo i castingu

Wspólnie skupimy się nie tylko na poprawności językowej, ale przede wszystkim na brzmieniu autentycznym i wiarygodnym dla widza.

Oprócz tego oferuję wsparcie w:
✔ przygotowaniu do egzaminów i matury
✔ języku biznesowym
✔ konwersacjach i ogólnej poprawie płynności

📍 Zajęcia prowadzę online oraz stacjonarnie
💰 Cena zależy od indywidualnych potrzeb (wiek, zakres materiału, forma zajęć)

Mówię płynnie po polsku, więc wszystko dokładnie wytłumaczę i dopasuję do Twojego stylu pracy.

📩 Napisz wiadomość prywatną, żeby ustalić szczegóły i zacząć pracę nad Twoim angielskim – tak, abyś mógł/mogła w pełni wejść w swoją rolę 🎭

Szukamy statystów na plan filmowy do zdjęć do serialu wertykalnego!

 Terminy zdjęć:

25.04 – statyści: goście klubu ze striptizem

28.04 – statyści: goście kasyna

Warszawa 

Projekt: serial (format wertykalny)

Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn, osób otwartych i naturalnych przed kamerą.

Zdjęcia trwają cały dzień (około 12 godzin)

Wynagrodzenie: 100 zł (gotówka po zdjęciach)

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej:

— aktualne zdjęcia

— wiek, wzrost

— dostępność na wybrane dni

Do zobaczenia na planie

🎥 Cześć! Do filmu autorstwa studentów Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej szukamy aktora do jednej z głównych ról w krótkometrażowym filmie fabularnym.

🔸 **Kogo szukamy?**
**Norbert **(25-35 lat) – charyzmatyczny łotrzyk, który prowadzi nie do końca legalny biznes. Szukamy osoby z doświadczeniem, najlepiej z dłuższymi włosami, ale nie jest to element konieczny, inne fryzury też wchodzą w grę:)

📍 Zdjęcia planowane są w drugiej połowie sierpnia tego roku

📩 Zgłoszenia (imię, nazwisko, telefon kontaktowy) z aktualnym zdjęciem (najlepiej luźne selfie) prosimy o przesyłanie na adres a.mikulska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

items.text:
⚡️Affordable Showreel Editing Service⚡️
Happy Sunday all! 

Need your first showreel creating or to update your old one? 

I provide a very affordable showreel service for new or established actors/directors/cinematographers/comedians/hobbyists etc. 

Basically, send me your footage (or I can try and source it for you online if it's commercially aired) and I shall edit it together into a lovely reel. 

Please see samples of recent clients in the link below 😎 

I'm an actor myself so I know how frustrating it can be, especially when you're starting out, to collate your footage together to get more work, without wanting to spend a fortune. 

My rates are £25/hour, with duration of work depending on how much footage you have. The average reels have been around £100 for my clients. Much more affordable than the companies that charge £250+ !! 

For any further info / enquiries / to book my services, drop me an email and I'll respond as quickly as I can: 

reelsforanyone@gmail.com 

I'll look forward to hearing from you. 

Thanks! 

😎
items.previewDescription: An affordable showreel editing service for creatives, by creatives.

items.text:
🎭**------WORKSHOP "THE ART OF PRESENCE"-------**🎭                                                
                                   📅**25-29 May 2026**                     
              at📍 **La Guillotine** in **Montreuil (FRANCE)**📍

**Le Bateau Noir** is organizing a physical theatre workshop conceived and led by **Juraj Benko** and **Oriane Hours**. For actors and amateurs alike, this **5-day workshop** is structured in two parts: ***training ***and ***creation***. 

🌞Mornings will be dedicated to **training of an actor**. The focus will be on d**eveloping stage presence, precision in actions and intentions**. The ability to connect with others. Through various exercises drawn from dance, martial arts, and physical theatre, we will work together on different **body languages** ​​and **stage energies**, seeking to develop each participant's unique creativity, essential to the **actor's craft**. 

🌝In the **afternoons**, we apply the morning tools in a creative process — adding **voice **and **text **to build presence into dramaturgy. Each participant develops their own unique expressive **story**.

**Workshop is led in French and English language.** 

🌺 **Oriane Hours** : Trained in classical theatre & corporeal mime in Paris. Founder of Compagnie de l'Oiseau Jaune. Actress, physical theatre performer, dancer, director and actor pedagogue.

🌻 **Juraj Benko**: Slovak actor & theatre maker. Graduate of University of the Arts London. Trained at Nordisk Teaterlaboratorium - Odin Teatret. Pedagogue, physical theatre, director.

**Participation**: €230 + €10 (association membership)
💰**Total**: €240*

✨Participation includes lunches carefully prepared by the Bateau Noir team. Homemade vegetarian menus for everyone! ✨

🌱Register at **cie.lebateaunoir@gmail.com** with a short message about yourself!

🎯 Le Bateau Noir [https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576666822835](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576666822835)

#physicaltheatre  #theatreworkshop #actortraining #Montreuil  #LeBateauNoir

attachments.ocrText: Na obrázku môže byť jedna osoba alebo viacerí ľudia a text, v ktorom sa píše „25 au 29 mai 2026 JURAJ BENKO ORIANE HOURS STAGE L'ART DE LA PRESENCE“
Môže ísť o ilustráciu text

Môže ísť o ilustráciu text, v ktorom sa píše „JURAJ BENKO Juraj Benko est acteur et créateur de spectacles originaire de Slovaquie. Diplômé de la prestigieuse Université d'Arts de Londres Jeu Scénique Spectacle vivant, poursuivi sa pratique travaillant des maîtres du théâtre européen asiatique notamment rejoignant Nordisk Teaterlaboratorium l'Odin Teatret. Sa formation d'acteur inclut les principes du théâtre physique, danse et des arts ORIANE HOURS Après des études théâtrales Paris, en théâtre classique mime corporel, Oriane Hours poursuit ensuite voie du théâtre physique en Europe. Passionnée du mouvement, elle monte Compagnie de l'Oiseau dans laquelle elle développe un univers engagé par création de spectacle une pédagogie de l'acteur.“

⚡️ See that energy ignite onstage. Don’t miss the magic of a live performance.
🎟️ Choose your best seats here: https://1kb.link/3F4Hyo  😊💖🎶
💫 Let yourself feel something unforgettable.
💛 You deserve it all.

items.text:
🎬Attention TV/Film Actors of All Ages and Levels- current and upcoming talent! The Focus Actor’s Conference is returning to Franklin this July at The Harpeth Hotel! Come learn, engage and network and ignite your acting career by experiencing two days of over 15 sessions, classes and panels, 20+ industry speakers and special guests, compete in the talent competition (ages 5+) in front of a panel of industry judges, special networking dessert and two keynote speakers! New this year- Project Pitch, where actors who create can pitch their project to a producers and filmmakers! ALL full conference tickets include a FREE Focus T-Shirt and Tickets to the VIP Networking Dessert, plus 2 incredible days of learning, meeting and listening/learning to agents, managers, producers, actors, filmmakers and more! 

Focus has SOLD OUT the last 2 years, and tickets are already going FAST! Use code: FOCUS10 for $10 off your full conference ticket (adult)! Student pricing and one day tickets available as well! 

Go to: www.focusactorsconference.com for all of the information! 

Visit our Instagram page: @focusactorsconference for announcements and more! 

Email: contact@focusactorsconference.com for more information. 

We look forward to seeing you in July!

items.text:
Hope you don’t mind me contacting you. I am a songwriter from Liverpool in England looking for an actor or singer to appear in the music video for a song I’ve written. Unfortunately, when I dragged my vocal file into AI voice changer,because I’m not an actual singer, it changed my voice  into an American accent which I quite liked. I have got into my head that I would like set the video in a New York scene and rather than use AI video generation I would much rather have somebody recite the song ,as it is a spoken word poem ,or mine the song
I’m quite willing to pay for your
Hope you’re intrigued enough to want to be involved. Thanks for your time.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: New Project Shooting this August!

Project Title: Shades of Identity

Type: independent film

Be part of a powerful story that explores the raw realities of colorism, sisterhood, and the courage to be seen. We are seeking 30+ diverse extras of all backgrounds and styles to help bring the world of Shades of Identity to life. This is an unpaid project, but it is a major opportunity to gain on-set experience, secure high-quality footage for your reel/portfolio, and earn an official film credit. The roles we need to fill.

We are officially casting for an upcoming project and would love to see your talent! Since we are keeping things streamlined, auditions will be held entirely online. WE SHOOT IN THE BOSTON’S AND SOMERVILLE AREA.

The Details
Shoot Date: August 2026

How to Apply: Choose a monologue for the role you’re interested in, record your self-tape, and email it directly to me!

Character Breakdown
We are looking for the following roles:

Lena (16–23): Black/Dark-skinned.

Maya (16–23): Black/Light-skinned.

Ashley (16–23): Plus-size.

Erica (16–23)

Theresa (16–23)

Aaron (16–23): The gay best friend; charismatic and loyal.

Tyla (16–23): The "mean girl" with a colorist attitude.

Camilla (16–23): Tyla’s sidekick.

Mr. Jones (45–55): The father figure; grounded and protective.

Therapist (35–55): Calm, professional, and observant.

Ready to Submit?
Please send your video auditions to: bmg30genzpub@gmail.com 

Tag a friend who would be perfect for one of these roles! We can't wait to see your submissions. 🎥🌟

topComments.text: I will play Mr Mr jones like the song goes lol lol

items.text:
Playbox Productions – Seeking Collaborators for Upcoming Production!
> 🚨 **URGENT CALL** 🚨

**PLAYBOX PRODUCTIONS** is seeking production team members for an upcoming play in 2026 (to be announced).

This will be an **intimate, small-cast production**, focused on grounded, truthful work and a strong ensemble process.

> **TO APPLY:**
1. Send your Resume, and Website (if applicable) to:
**playboxpgh@gmail.com**
2. Include your availability for the production timeline, especially tech and performances.
3. And ask us any questions you may have!

> **Timeline:**
* Rehearsals: August 3 – September 13 (Strip District)
* Tech + Performances: September 14 – October 4 (Downtown Pittsburgh)

> All roles are **volunteer/contract-based**, with the intention of paying cast and crew per production. Compensation is **contingent on overall budget and ticket sales**.
> For reference, we were able to compensate our team during our sold-out run of *1984* in December 2025.
> Members of the Playbox community have worked with City Theatre, The Public Theater, The Pittsburgh Cultural Trust, Carnegie Mellon, Point Park, CLO, The Talent Group, and the 48 Hour Play Festival, to name a few. Please see roles below.

## **Currently Seeking:**

> **Production Manager**

Oversees the logistical and operational execution of the production from pre-production through closing.
* Coordinates schedules and timelines
* Manages logistics and communication
* Supports rehearsals and performances
* Acts as liaison between artistic and technical teams
> **Director**
* Develops and executes the artistic vision
* Leads rehearsals and guides performers
* Collaborates with designers and production staff
> **Stage Manager**
* Runs rehearsals and performances
* Tracks blocking, cues, and notes
* Maintains reports and team communication
> **Assistant Stage Managers (ASM)**
* Assist with rehearsal setup and breakdown
* Help track props, cues, and backstage needs
* Support communication and organization during rehearsals, tech, and shows
> **Designers (Set, Props Asst., Sound, & Lighting Designers)**

Collaborate with the director and team to shape the visual and technical elements of the production.

* Design and execute assigned elements
* Work closely with director and technical team
* Participate in meetings and tech rehearsals

## **Additional Roles We Are Seeking:**

> **Producers**

Support overall coordination, planning, and execution of the production alongside the Playbox team.
> **Construction / Set Builders**

Assist in building and assembling scenic elements to bring the set design to life.
> **Fight Director**

Design and safely choreograph staged physical moments and ensure actor safety.
> **Board Operators**

Run lighting or sound cues during performances.
> **Marketing Manager**

Leads the programming & promotion the production through social media, content, and audience outreach.

Thank You!

We look forward to your application and will be in touch shortly if interested via email or phone call.

**The Playbox Team, 2026**
Office #: (412) 282-3916
*[Website Currently Under Construction]*

items.text:
WEEKLY ROUNDUP FROM INSIDE MATT ZINA’S INNER CIRCLE 🎬
30% of our actors self-taped for one of the UK’s most loved TV soaps.�56 PAID opportunities dropped into the group.�And one actor?
Asked how to price herself…�…and walked away billing DOUBLE 💰
This isn’t luck.�This is what happens when you’re in the right room.
Actors outside are waiting.�Actors inside are moving.
The ones who got in early?�They’re on fire right now 🔥
If you’re serious about your acting career…�Stop watching from the outside.
👉 https://www.mzacting.com/matt-zinas-inner-circle.html
#actorslife #selftape #actingcareer #ukactors #auditions

sharedPost.text:
WE ARE HIRING! Have you always wanted to be a princess or a superhero? Well now is your opportunity! We will be holding interviews and auditions in early May and would love to hear from YOU!  

We are a small, fun and slightly crazy team who have a passion for making magical memories and bringing stories to life 💙 

Please send 
✨ A headshot 
✨ A performers CV

To lydiabailys@gmail.com

We can’t wait to hear from you! 

#hiring #performers #performing #job #jobopportunity

items.text:
Update - now Cast - thank you everyone.

Posting for my son. He urgently needs a female actor available next Wednesday for filming (with possibly a read through via zoom prior) filming in Dunmow, Essex. My son is studying at London Screen Academy and is creating a short film for his end of year project. Due to a last minute cancellation he is now stuck without an actor. He is looking for a female actor aged 23-28. The material from the video will be provided for you to use in your personal showreel. — sorry that that we can’t afford to pay as it’s a college project but he will provide the footage for you to use as a showreel.

topComments.text: Hi I am in Takeley up the road from you not the right age group but if u need anything else can help
I am available! Essex based x

‼️URGENT CASTING CALL FOR STUDENT PROJECT‼️
**‼️CASTING CALL‼️**
(unpaid but can pay for travel if needed)

Hello, I’m a student at Coastland College doing my second year final major project!

Looking for an actor to play the main character in my short film, “**Toppled Choices**”.

**Plot:** The main character is retelling their previous day in therapy. That day, they made choices that led to a bystander's death, littering in the road, and causing a crash.

**(Script for specifics attached)**

**Main character: **Around the **age of 18-22**, no specified gender

**Date filming**: **26th April** + additional discussed date

**Location**: **Wareham**

**Requirements:** **Self-tape**, around the age of **18-22**

Thanks for any interest! Feel free to message or send me an email: **CaitlinFilmTv@outlook.com**

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Energy Drink Spec! (OC/LA, Paid) 

Currently casting for (3) youthful, female leads for an energy drink spec for a growing production company. 

The shoot (non-union) will be in Los Angeles/Orange County, sometime in May, with a day rate of $50. Along with compensation, the actors will get some BTS & additional photos + videos for  their social media/reel/portfolio.  

ISO: 

(1) – Beach Runner: clean, natural, everyday, fit/athletic girl-next-door type of character, this position will require some light jogging/running 
(1) – Pilates/Yoga Practitioner: quiet confidence, natural vibe, fit/athletic, disciplined
(1) – Party Attendee: Free Spirited, extroverted, high energy, bright smile,bold-ish vibe, but still maintaining the clean, athletic/fit look, etc. 

* Each role will have different skills/requirements

If interested, please submit your: 
- Contact information
- Dates you’re available in May
- Headshot, full body shot, reel
- Resume
to riannamamitag.prod@gmail.com ! 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Last Name - Role(s) - Spec 

Looking forward to your submissions & connecting with you! Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

items.text:
PUSSĒ — CASTING CALL

Project Type: Experimental Psychological Horror
Tone: Horror • Spiritual • Unsettling
Production: Katastrophic Films & IFM Entertainment
Location: Southwest Florida
Compensation: Unpaid (Passion Project / Portfolio Building)
Duration: 1-2 hours 
Date: end of April - early May

Send Submissions To - Kat.KatastrophicFilms@gmail.com

⸻

CHANNEL 2 — “BUDGET HEALTH PROGRAM”

Role: Older PBS Host
Gender: Male
Age Range: 50–75

Type:
Soft-spoken • Academic • Slightly awkward

Description:
We are seeking an actor to portray a monotone, early PBS-style presenter in a surreal broadcast segment. The performance should feel stiff and controlled, almost robotic in delivery.

The tone walks a fine line between subtle humor and quiet dread. The character should feel off in a way that’s difficult to immediately place. Should be disconnected, clinical, and unsettling beneath the surface.

Think: educational programming that slowly begins to feel wrong.

⸻

🎭 PERFORMANCE NOTES:

* Minimal, restrained delivery
* Comfort with long pauses and unnatural pacing
* Ability to create unease through stillness and tone rather than intensity
* Improvisation ability is a plus

⸻

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS:

Please include:

* Headshot
* Demo Reel
* Any relevant horror or stylized work

Also indicate your comfort level with:

* Horror elements
* SFX (blood, prosthetics)
* Nudity (for specific roles only)

⸻

⚠️ PROJECT NOTE:

This is a stylized, experimental piece with strong visual and tonal direction. Ideal for actors interested in psychological horror, analog aesthetics, and unconventional storytelling.

CASTING CALL – NON-SPEAKING PRODUCT VIDEO

Roles:
Looking for 6 men and women, ages 25–50, all ethnicities welcome. Product is a type of food storage bag. Non-union. 

Project Details:
This is a simple, non-speaking product shoot focused on natural, everyday usage in a home environment.

Rate:
$30/hour (minimum 4-hour pay = $120)

Location:
Vancouver and/or Langley
Some roles will require 2 shoot days (one in each location).
One role will require 1 shoot day in Langley only. 

Shoot Dates:
TBD – Scheduling is flexible. We are aiming to film within the next 1–2 weeks and will coordinate based on availability.

Submission Instructions:
Please email the following to Ecomfilmworks@gmail.com
- Recent photos
- Any relevant experience (optional)
- General availability over the next 2 weeks

Subject Line: Casting – Food Storage

items.text:
METHOD OF MADNESS - SHORT FILM CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22. 

The deadline for self-tapes have been extended to Friday April 17th at 11:59PM. Callbacks will be held on Monday April 20 (6:00-8:00PM) and Tuesday April 21 (TBD).

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to gomethod. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please email methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com for any inquires.

We are looking for both **union and non-union** actors.

Character Bios:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 35-45, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. 

Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 17 @ 11:59PM. The callbacks will be on April 20th and April 21th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. 

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. We hope to hear from you :)

Come and join me for my online workshop of how to get REPRESENTED and how to get CAST on April the 29th at 7pm! ! Organised by my bestie KKevin McDonagh who is the co-founder of both AActors UKand the BBirmingham Film Festival There are literally only a handful of tickets, so get 'em while they're hot from the LINK BELOW! I look forward to seeing some of you then! You've got to be in it to win it! Sean x

items.text:
**CASTING – PAID (URGENT)**

Looking for female actors (late 20s to mid 30s) for short mock consultation filming for a medical e-learning platform.

Details:
* Stratford-upon-Avon
* Wed 22 April (13:00–14:00) or Thurs 23 April (11:30–12:30)
* 10-minute filmed consultation with a doctor (guided, not scripted)
* £200 (travel covered)

Straightforward roleplay scenario. Direction and prompts provided on the day.

Must be comfortable on camera and able to take direction.

If available, please email:
tom.charnley@dermamedical.co.uk

Include:
* Headshot
* Age
* Location
* Availability (which slot)

Looking to confirm ASAP.

topComments.text: Hi Tom, just sent you an email!

* 10-minute filmed consultation with a doctor (guided, not scripted)
* £200 (travel covered)

Straightforward roleplay scenario. Direction and prompts provided on the day.

Must be comfortable on camera and able to take direction.

If available, please email:
tom.charnley@dermamedical.co.uk

Include:
* Headshot
* Age
* Location
* Availability (which slot)

Looking to confirm ASAP.

items.text:
WARSZAWA - FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA
DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 21.04

CHARAKTERYZACJA (mężczyźni) - 18.04

Do filmu fabularnego szukam statystów oraz epizodystów do jednej sceny w roli fotoreporterów / dziennikarzy. 

STATYŚCI

- Panie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 130 zł (dzień zdjęciowy bez charakteryzacji)

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 200 zł (dzień zdjęciowy 130zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)

EPIZODYŚCI

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: K21 (statysta lub epizodysta)

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to zgłoszenie do epizodu) wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'SZUKAMY STATYSTOW I EPIZODYSTÓW! DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY 21.04 CHARAKTERYZACJA (MĘŻCZYŻNI)- 18.04 DO ROLI FOTOREPORTERÓW/ DZIENNIKARZY STATYŚCI Panie -w wieku ok. 20-50 lat stawka → 130 (dzień zdjęciowy bez charakteryzacji) Panowie w wieku ok. 20-50 lat- stawka → 200 zł (dzień zdjęciowy 130zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł) EPIZODYŚCI •Panowie w wieku ok. 20-50 lat- stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy- + charakteryzacja) w zgłoszeniu: imię nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to epizod), wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. POD TYTUŁEM agata@podtytulem.pl'

items.text:
🎬 Cześć Warszawa! 🌿

Szukam Panów w wieku 20-55 do scen plenerowych – przechodnie w parku.

📅 Termin zdjęć: 22.04 środa 

⏰ Plan krótki, ale godziny nieznane – wymagana dyspozycyjność całodniowa.

💰 Stawka: 150 zł netto

💸 Płatność przelewem

📩 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na:

Numer 797169069

✉️ Tytuł sms : plener 22.04

W zgłoszeniu proszę podać:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• numer telefonu

• aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)

⚠️ Proszę o zgłoszenia osoby zdecydowane – zgłoszenia od razu przekazuję do produkcji.

⏳ Zgłoszenia przyjmuję tylko dzisiaj 20.04 do 19:00

Marta Filmakcja 🎞️🎬

Czekam na Was! 💛

TROJMIASTO ] [ 23.04- 24.04]
[ NON PROFIT ] [ DOP]

Hej jestem studentem ostatniego roku rezyserii w Gdyńskiej Szkole Filmowej,  do zdjęć do dyplomu dokumentalnego szukam  DOPa na dwa dni.

Dokument opowiada o trojmieskim skaterze.

Zdjęcia w dwa dni czwartek i piątek 23 i 24 kwietnia. Nie są to pelne dni zdjęciowe. Od godziny 15 do 22.

Osoby chętne proszę o komentarz bądź kontakt na priv.

items.text:
Do serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

1. Mikołaj Rudnicki (23) – Z bogatej rodziny, typ bananka, co myśli, ze zawsze dostanie to czego chce. Urażona duma, kompleksy. Studiuje psychologie. Prace licencjacką sobie kupuje, ale musi zaliczyć praktyki w ośrodku. Umie grać dobrze wychowanego. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 27., 28. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

2. Szcześniak (17) – współlokator Igiego. Z początku nie wydaje go dyrekcji, ale jak już wychodzi zbrodnia, współpracuje. Zna sekrety kumpla, ale nie wszystkie.

Data: 28. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Wara (27) – Diler, który nie ma skrupułów, chce tylko zarobić. Nawet kiedy widać, że jego towar (fentanyl) niszczy zdrowie Kupca. Chce tylko zmniejszyć wyrok, znał się z Igim z transakcji. Polubił go, ale dla niego liczy się biznes.

Daty: 27. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

4. Kupiec (22) – Chłopak zniszczony przez fentanyl. Ma już problemy z oddychaniem, widać z daleka, ze z jego zdrowiem jest coś nie tak. Ma duszności, potrzebna mu pomoc

Data: 27. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Marcin Kowalik (38) – kurier, przystojny, kochanek Pani Sobczak, fałszywie oskarżony o skłonności pedofilskie, zostaje pobity w parku 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 700 zł netto

6. Zbigniew Zawadzki (65) – razem z żoną uprawia na emeryturze nordic walking, odważny, sprawny, razem z żoną przepędzają napastników, którzy pobili Marcina 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Filip Grodzki (26) – pewny siebie, przekonany o słuszności polowania na pedofili, należy do grupy tropiącej pedofili, razem z Krzysztofem organizuje akcję pobicia Marcina. Chętnie tatuaże.

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

8. Krzysztof Pawlak (27) – od niedawna na grupie tropiącej pedofili, razem z Filipem pobił Marcina, ma wyrzuty sumienia po brutalnym pobiciu, myślał, że inaczej to będzie wyglądać.

Daty: 30. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

9. Jarosław Sobczak (42) – przedsiębiorca, prowadzi firmę kurierską z żoną. Gdy dowiaduje się o romansie żony, próbuje zepsuć reputację kochanka. Zleca wygenerowania fałszywych dowodów świadczących o skłonnościach pedofilskich kochanka żony. Nie przewidział, że kochanek zostaje ciężko pobity 

Data: 29. kwietnia 
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Lekarz (56) – lekarz prowadzący przypadek Marcina, ubrany w fartuch lekarski, starszy mężczyzna, z wyglądu wygląda na osobę doświadczoną w swoim fachu 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu
items.summary:
Do serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

1. Mikołaj Rudnicki (23) – Z bogatej rodziny, typ bananka, co myśli, ze zawsze dostanie to czego chce. Urażona duma, kompleksy. Studiuje psychologie. Prace licencjacką sobie kupuje, ale musi zaliczyć praktyki w ośrodku. Umie grać dobrze wychowanego. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 27., 28. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

2. Szcześniak (17) – współlokator Igiego. Z początku nie wydaje go dyrekcji, ale jak już wychodzi zbrodnia, współpracuje. Zna sekrety kumpla, ale nie wszystkie.

Data: 28. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Wara (27) – Diler, który nie ma skrupułów, chce tylko zarobić. Nawet kiedy widać, że jego towar (fentanyl) niszczy zdrowie Kupca. Chce tylko zmniejszyć wyrok, znał się z Igim z transakcji. Polubił go, ale dla niego liczy się biznes.

Daty: 27. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

4. Kupiec (22) – Chłopak zniszczony przez fentanyl. Ma już problemy z oddychaniem, widać z daleka, ze z jego zdrowiem jest coś nie tak. Ma duszności, potrzebna mu pomoc

Data: 27. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Marcin Kowalik (38) – kurier, przystojny, kochanek Pani Sobczak, fałszywie oskarżony o skłonności pedofilskie, zostaje pobity w parku 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 700 zł netto

6. Zbigniew Zawadzki (65) – razem z żoną uprawia na emeryturze nordic walking, odważny, sprawny, razem z żoną przepędzają napastników, którzy pobili Marcina 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Filip Grodzki (26) – pewny siebie, przekonany o słuszności polowania na pedofili, należy do grupy tropiącej pedofili, razem z Krzysztofem organizuje akcję pobicia Marcina. Chętnie tatuaże.

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

8. Krzysztof Pawlak (27) – od niedawna na grupie tropiącej pedofili, razem z Filipem pobił Marcina, ma wyrzuty sumienia po brutalnym pobiciu, myślał, że inaczej to będzie wyglądać.

Daty: 30. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

9. Jarosław Sobczak (42) – przedsiębiorca, prowadzi firmę kurierską z żoną. Gdy dowiaduje się o romansie żony, próbuje zepsuć reputację kochanka. Zleca wygenerowania fałszywych dowodów świadczących o skłonnościach pedofilskich kochanka żony. Nie przewidział, że kochanek zostaje ciężko pobity 

Data: 29. kwietnia 
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Lekarz (56) – lekarz prowadzący przypadek Marcina, ubrany w fartuch lekarski, starszy mężczyzna, z wyglądu wygląda na osobę doświadczoną w swoim fachu 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Women fashion brand casting.

Mayfig, a new Canadian-designed stretch denim brand, is looking for 2 female models.

We’re looking for:
• Size 26” (1 model)
• Size 28” (1 model)
• Height: 5’8” – 5’10”
• Age: 20–35

What you’ll be doing:
• Fit testing (help us perfect the jeans)
• Editorial & Catalogue photo shoots

Details:
• $40/hour
• Majority of work in Surrey, with some shoots in Vancouver
• Ongoing opportunities with a growing Canadian brand

If you (or someone you know) fit the description, email Luke@jnalvit.com, or DM with your measurements, height, and a few recent photos. Those selected will be contacted directly.

topComments.text: You should also include a model in the 50’s who could look fabulous in your denim.

items.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL - COMEDIC, ENERGETIC, ORIGINAL MUSICAL 🚨 

SIGMA ACAPELLA

Non-Equity, Profit-Share - Vancouver, Local

Full breakdown and submission details:
https://www.vancouveractorsguide.com/auditions/sigma-acapella-0

Everyone is welcome to submit but we would like to especially encourage LGBTQ+ actors! We also currently have more Male-Presenting roles to cast. Open to new actors.

"When the University’s development plans involve the destruction of all “degenerate" and "unnecessary” clubs and societies, one Frat-Star and his house of Himbos must team up with a Theater Dad and his underdog squad of Theater Kids in order to save the only home they've ever known, and maybe get a little cultured on the way. An original musical that revisits the true, wholesome meaning of “boys being boys” and the endearingly unhinged quality of drama majors, Sigma Acapella promises laughs, songs, dance and romance!"

items.text:
CASTING CALL / PAID / Non-Union

Looking for four diverse young talents for a two-day video production in showcasing community infrastructure and services. Video requiring natural, authentic interactions representing local residents. Non-speaking roles.

Each select talent would be expected to be available for half day over the two day schedule. Please indicate your availability in your response.

Desired Attributes:

  • Non-union

  • Open to all ethnicities

  • Children aged 6-12

  • Available April 27-28 (subject to change) in Lower Mainland

  • Comfortable with professional video production environment

Usage:

  • Municipal marketing and promotional materials in Canada

  • Perpetual

Budget:

  • $450 / person (up to 5 hours)

Apply @ go.opencast.ca/casting/CSC by Apr 17, 2026

Questions? info@opencast.ca

items.text: We are now accepting applications from international film or television production crews to shoot in Thailand. A special opportunity awaits: a 30% recouping of any investment of 50 million baht. Cash Rebate 467,340.75 $  Conditions: The film must collaborate with our team and promote soft power in Thailand. (We have a selection of films and series for you to choose from, and we can adapt the script to suit your country.) Contact us if interested. Shoot a film or series and get a refund – only with us!

topComments.text: Interested. And I’m Thai so would be nice to visit family and make a movie too 🙏🏽☺️

Wer Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße bucht, entscheidet sich gegen Durchschnitt und für Präsenz, Tempo und echten Wiedererkennungswert mit Suchtgefahr 🎬

Wir sind nicht da, um irgendeinen Slot zu füllen, wir sind da, um Eurem Projekt genau die Wirkung zu geben, die anderen fehlt. 

Wer Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße bucht, entscheidet sich gegen Durchschnitt und für Präsenz, Tempo und echten Wiedererkennungswert mit Suchtgefahr 🎬

christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
sanny.woetzel+talent@gmail.com

items.previewDescription: NeuMann versteht durch technische Brillianz, Charme, Humor und Emotionalität sein Publikum in den Bann zu ziehen. Stimme und Gitarrenspiel verursachen Gänsehaut. Sein Repertoire bietet eine vorzügliche Bandbreite – ob Covers oder eigene Songs. Großartig ist die Flexibilität, auf Musikwünsche...

sharedPost.text: Mittsommer Konzert im Lindenhof Theater in Braunschweig. Am 15. Juni spielt Violin Virtuose und Konzertmeister Johannes Denhoff zusammen mit der von ihm gegründeten und geleiteten Lindenhofkapelle das diesjährige Mittsommer Konzert um 19.30 Uhr. Auf dem Programm steht unter anderem die Pastorale von Ludwig van Beethoven. Karten gibt es bei der Konzertkasse und bei Musikalien Bartels und an der Abendkasse oder im Internet unter https://www.eventim.de/event/mittsommer-konzert-theater-im-lindenhof-21176192/?srsltid=AfmBOoq5EEZ9rUIRGNAV_Q9tNLUTU7GeF93HkbE-xNgUF849FgJFA1z-

items.text:
ATLANTA’S GOT TALENT!
� My organization, Elevation Arts is launching an URBAN YOUTH COMMUNITY PERFORMANCE CHORUS right here in the East Lake, Kirkwood, East Atlanta area!￼! � 

“Global C.U.P. (Children United w/Purpose) Community Youth Chorus”

� We are now accepting audition requests! If you know of a local talented youth in 4th through 8th grades who resides in the Eastlake, Kirkwood, East Atlanta, Decatur area, please forward this to their parents!
Auditions will be held Saturday, April 25th in Kirkwood. Log onto our website to get additional information and to fill out registration form.  (After registering, you will be contacted and notified about location and time for Audition ) 
�ONLY 50 SLOTS AVAILABLE FOR THIS CHOIR�! 
�Acceptance is based on vocal talent, high energy, discipline, and choreographic stamina. 

�CLICK HERE TO SECURE YOUR  YOUTH’S AUDITION SLOT: 
https://wilmarkmediagroup.com/

(“Global C.U.P. (Children United w/Purpose) Youth Choir” mission is to unite local youth through powerful musical performances. We exist for the purpose of building community through harmony and the performing arts as we champion social equity, inclusion and diversity. Children of all ages, races, and ethnicities are welcome as we gather, celebrate, and uplift our voices around the spirit of the global games. 

“One Game… One World… One Sound”)

items.text:
CASTING IS OPEN FOR OUR DEBUT FEATURE FILM PAID POSITION

Filming is taking place in June and will be shot in the Woking Surrey area

we are looking for a boy child actor playing age between 5-10 To portray the character of Elijah, who is non-verbal and autistic, a variety of skills and qualities are necessary:

1. Research and Understanding: It's essential to have an understanding of autism, particularly non-verbal autism. This includes recognizing the diversity of experiences and behaviors within the autism spectrum. The role requires an empathetic approach to connect authentically with Elijah's experiences and emotions while being sensitive to the nuances of his communication style.

2. We require legal guardian/ parents to be present during auditions

3. we will be working with the local authorities and adhering to the strict rules enforced by local authorities via Child Performance Licences, which mandate maximum time on set, limits on on-camera time, and specific breaks for meals and rest etc�

please apply by sending your details and spotlight to our email address at tideswellproduction@gmail.com

thank you for reading and hope you are all have a fantastic rest of the week

items.text:
Hi, if you’re tired of getting job rejections and you’re ready to start your own business then you need to sign up for Launch It! Start Your Own Creative Business 8 Day FREE Bootcamp happening May 11th at Mango Studios LDN which includes 1 month free office/studio space!

Open for all Islington residents aged 18 +

Sign up here: mangostudiosldn.com

sharedPost.text:
👀HUGE OPPORTUNITY! 🚨

We are pleased to announce that we have partnered with @islingtoncouncil to make 2026 the year you start or grow your Creative Business!

We are running a FREE 8 Day Bootcamp for aspiring business owners to start their own business and struggling business owners to grow their business in the Creative Sector!🤩

Plus 1 month FREE workspace is available at our awesome studio in Finsbury Park! 🤯

Launch It! Start Your Creative Business Bootcamp is taking place right here at Mango Studios LDN in May 2026!! 🤑

This is your chance to join our FREE 8 Day Bootcamp where you will learn:

- How to start/grow a business
- How to create a brand 
- How to overcome obstacles
- How to hire the right people
- How to build a sales strategy
- How to have a resilient mindset
- How to go from idea to action!
And much more!!

When: Monday 11th May - Thursday 21st May 2026

Timing: 11am - 5pm 

Where: Mango Studios LDN, Tower House, 139 Fonthill Road, London, N4 3HF 

Who can apply: Islington Residents aged 18 and over. 

Cost: FREE plus you get Lunch provided by us! 😋

Applications are open now and close April 30th at 6pm. Link in bio to apply!

Spaces are limited to please act fast!

This 8 day bootcamp is designed to help you move from idea to action!

#london #business #creative

WARSZAWA - FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA

DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 21.04
CHARAKTERYZACJA (mężczyźni) - 18.04

Do filmu fabularnego szukam epizodystów do jednej sceny w roli fotoreporterów / dziennikarzy. 
- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: K21 epizod
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to zgłoszenie do epizodu) wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

items.text:
CASTING DLA FANÓW KULINARIÓW 🍽️ 🧚🏻‍♀️
WIELE RÓL, zajrzyjcie koniecznie👀

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu dla firmy cateringowej👌

Szukamy osób z dobrą dykcją, wyrazistą mimiką i umiejętnością grania „całym ciałem”. Liczy się luz, humor, naturalność i plastyczność w grze aktorskiej 🎭

 KOGO SZUKAMY?

1. JUSTYNA – mama i menadżerka (35–40 lat)
2. KASIA – ekspertka kulinarna (ok. 30 lat)
3. LIDIA – świadoma redukująca (40–50 lat), naturalna sylwetka
4. PIOTR – 30–40 lat, lekki zarost, zadbany
5. RAFAŁ – ok. 35 lat, normalna sylwetka, „pan z brzuszkiem”
6. BŁAŻEJ – ok. 30 lat, wysportowany sceptyk, tradycjonalista
7. KAROL – 45+, budowlaniec, silny, postawny

🐶 Jeśli masz zwierzę (pies/kot) – koniecznie dodaj informację i zdjęcie w zgłoszeniu

user.name: Majestic Academy of Performing Arts & Dance - Chester

items.text:
Summer-Joules is on fire right now 🔥🎬
Since Thursday alone:
2 feature film auditions & a TV series with Majestic plus 2 auditions with her LA agency and 1 audition coming through from management in Canada 🎬
This is what hard work, focus, and real dedication look like. I don’t know how she does it! Not just showing up for yourself, but continuing to lift and support others along the way too.
Keep pushing, keep growing, and keep being unapologetically you. The momentum is real 💜💛

©️Majestic Talent Majestic Academy of Performing Arts & Dance - Chester

#Actor #TalentAgency #PerformingArts #ActingSchool #Chester

sharedPost.text: … in einer lauen Sommernacht? Täglich, zum Frühstück, höre ich die Hiobsbotschaften. Kriege, Naturkatastrophen, Tote, verletzte und das von morgens bis abends. Und dann kommen bei dir vielleicht noch die Dinge dazu, die einfach aus dem Ruder laufen . Dazu ! Ich frag mich manchmal wie wir das aushalten? Was es letztendlich mit uns macht?

items.text:
AUDITIONS!!!

MURDER FOR TWO by Kellen Blair and Joe Kinosian 

Directed by Kerri Norris for The Royal Canadian Theatre Company

Casting paid, non-union role, 25-40 years old, female presenting, to play THE SUSPECTS. All ethnicities and backgrounds are encouraged to audition. (Please note: the role of Marcus has been cast) 

This role requires a high skill level of piano playing, singing ability and performance. Comedic skills, some dance and ability to improv are assets.This fast paced, 90-minute, musical whodunnit features two actors who act, sing and play the piano throughout. They accompany themselves, each other and sometimes play together. The actor cast as THE SUSPECTS needs a high energy and versatile performance that can switch between the 10 different characters at the drop of a hat. 

Vocal range: Bb3-E5 (as written, but can be transposed)

Grade 9 RCM piano ability for the most difficult passages of music

Rehearsals running August 2nd – September 22nd at The Studio, 10660 City Parkway, Surrey.

(Rehearsals will be Sunday daytime & Tues/Thurs evenings up until show opening. Two additional back-up rehearsals will be scheduled based on cast availability.  Tech week schedule TBD.)

Show runs September/October in Surrey/New Westminster

Surrey: September 25-27 (Dress Rehearsal, Sept 24)
New Westminster: October 2-4 (Dress Rehearsal, Oct 1)
Auditions by electronic submission.  

2 min video recording accompanying yourself singing a comedic song
1 min comedic monologue sample.    
Please also send your headshot and CV with your submission to auditions@rctheatreco.com by May 4th. 

TITLE ALL FILES WITH YOUR NAME!

Local submissions only for this casting call

Callbacks: Saturday, May 9th. (Only those invited to callbacks will be contacted. Those invited will be given a short excerpt from the show to learn, for piano & voice as well as sides from the script.)

items.text:
Casting call for feature film by Jeremiah Zagar. 

SEEKING: Boys ages 5-9. Any ethnicity. No acting experience or training necessary. English required. French familiarity a plus! 

SUBMIT: Email skrobecasting@gmail.com 
* Subject line: Painted Bride - [your child's name] 
* Include parent/guardian contact info, including location 
* Child name, age. 
* Include a photo - and a video starting with a slate, and telling us about yourself, and an experience you've had with an animal (it can be anything - we just want to hear you tell a story) 
* Nationwide call. 

Any questions please email - I will not respond on Facebook.

Kamed Studio 

21 kwietnia 
Stawki płatne po planie:
dorośli 120 zł.
dzieci 150 zł.

Gramy w Milanówku 🙂 scenę chrzcin 

Na plan nowego serialu szukamy kilku statystów w różnym wieku, którzy wcielą się w członków rodziny bohaterów serialu. Szukamy osób z Milanówka, bliskich okolic lub takich, którzy nie mają problemu z samodzielnym dojazdem na plan. (Dobrze działająca kolejka WKD)
Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o przesłanie zgłoszenia na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać 
- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- informację skąd jesteś 
- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- aktualne zdjęcie (twarz I sylwetka)
- dzieci informację czy posiadają w naszej agencji ważne dokumenty PiP

Tytuł maila CHRZCINY

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – EPIZOD AKTORSKI – CHŁOPIEC 9-11 LAT**

 

Do filmu fabularnego szukam chłopca 7-11 lat. Naturalnego, ujmującego, z charakterem: „słodki łobuziak”, energiczny, trochę „do przodu”, z ulicznym vibe’em (hip-hop, rytm). Nie szukam „reklamowego” typu. To bardzo poruszająca rola. Mile widziani chłopcy z doświadczeniem w filmach/serialach fabularnych. Krótkie włosy będą atutem, ale nie są warunkiem.

Rola przewiduje ok. 3 dni zdjęciowe, w interakcji z głównymi bohaterami.

Casting będzie dwuetapowy:

1.    selekcja na podstawie nadesłanych materiałów,

2.    zaproszenie wybranych chłopców na casting do studia w Warszawie.

Casting i zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie – preferowani chłopcy z Warszawy i okolic.

**Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do poniedziałku 20.04 do godz.: 10:00**

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **CHŁOPIEC**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost + informacja o doświadczeniu przed kamerą**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

Krótkie włosy będą atutem, ale nie są warunkiem. zadanie dni zdjęciowe, w interakcji z głównymi bohaterami. zgłoszenia przyjmuję poniedziałku 20.04 (10:00). Preferowani chłopcy z Warszawy okolic. ZDJĘCIE TWARZY selfie dziennym świetle, na wprost, kolorowe, bez filtrów ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI aktualne zdjęcie calej sylwetki ZGŁOSZENIA NA: ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl w tytule: CHŁOPIEC do 20.04 （10：00） Więcej szczegółów w treści posta'

Zapraszamy na warsztaty dubbingu, gdzie poznasz kulisy pracy lektora, nagrasz własne kwestie i poczujesz się jak w prawdziwym studiu nagraniowym! 🎧

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia – liczy się chęć i dobra zabawa!
Przyjdź, odkryj swój talent i przeżyj coś wyjątkowego ✨

items.text:
UWAGA !!!    PILNE !!!    WARSZAWA !!!    GLINIARZE !!!

Do serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

Wara (27) – Diler, który nie ma skrupułów, chce tylko zarobić. Nawet kiedy widać, że jego towar (fentanyl) niszczy zdrowie Kupca. Chce tylko zmniejszyć wyrok, znał się z Igim z transakcji. Polubił go, ale dla niego liczy się biznes.

Daty: 27. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Hey gang!!

So I've been working on a little project and I'd love to invite you all to come check it out!

This year I partnered with two incredible film makers, Seamus Birmingham and Jake Unger, to create a documentary about the school Pax attends The Rocky Mountain School of Expeditionary Learning - RMSEL. The fellas have done all the hard work, I just pointed at people and said, "ooo! they'd be good to talk to!" 

What they have created looks incredible and I could not be more proud!

We are having a big "red carpet" premiere/screening on May 28th at The People's Building. This will also be a fundraiser for both the school and the film to be submitted to festivals and what not. 

If you don't already know, this school is one of the most remarkable learning environments, but it is severly underfunded. It is not a charter or private school. It is a public school of choice governed by a BOCES board. As such, it does not recieve any bond or mill levy money that other schools (including charters) are allotted. This leaves us fighting for every dollar while providing a world class education and experiences of a lifetime to students. 

The film is titled, In The Absence of Shelter. Tickets will be available for purchase through The People's Building or at the door. $5 student and faculty $20 general public. [https://www.thepeoplesbuilding.com/about-us](https://www.thepeoplesbuilding.com/about-us)

The premiere is May 28th, 2026
Doors open at 6:00
Film is approximately 60 min run time
We will have a talk back afterwards with the film makers, students and faculty
The People's Building 
9995 E. Colfax
Aurora CO 80010

Hope to see youn there!! We would LOVE to get some press and local politicians in the room, so please share! Thanks!!!

items.text:
Now casting for "The Hero Complex."

A heartfelt short film about a superhero discovering self-care for the first time. For all of us who feel like the weight of the world is too much to carry.

Production Title: The Hero Complex

Genre: Drama

Production Type: Indie

Run Time: 10 minutes

Compensation: $400 flat.

Union/Non-Union Status: Open to either

Audition Information: Virtual/Self Tape

Shooting Schedule:

● Rehearsals Saturday, 5/23

● Shoot Sunday 5/24 & Monday 5/25 (holiday)

Shooting Location: Broomfield, CO

Email: herocomplexshortfilm@gmail.com

Character Breakdowns:

CLARK | Male | 28–35

Classic Superman archetype. Tall (5'10" +), black hair (or willing to dye), athletic build. Genuine physical presence, but with a mild-mannered, slightly awkward civilian side. Equal parts everyman and hero.

Please send your resume to herocomplexshortfilm@gmail.com, and, upon request, I'll email you the attached side. Self-tape by Friday, April 17th.

items.text:
Hume Baugh here: I'm doing a scene study class Tuesday May 12-Tuesday June 16, 2026 7-10 pm at The Practice Room 688 Richmond West Rm. 302, Toronto. We will be working on scenes and monologues. You can bring a couple of scenes to the first class, in which we will choose what to work on. You will have lots of time to work on your scene each class, and can work outside of class if you wish. The work will focus on objectives, the scene partner, and the actor's dynamic presence in the room, using one's authentic self. Come and join us - it will be fun, informal, and informative. Get in touch at humebaugh@yahoo.ca if you're interested.

I have been an actor, director and teacher for 43 years in Toronto and elsewhere. I have taught at George Brown, Sheridan College, Fanshawe College, and privately. My acting credits include Stratford, Shaw, Canadian Stage, Tarragon, Factory, Passe Muraille, Theatre Rusticle, Threshold Theatre, Young People's Theatre, Shakespeare in the Rough, Festival of Classics, Blue Ceiling Dance, Ecce Homo, and One Little Goat, among many others. 

I have directed Drums in the Night, Of Mice and Men, The Winter's Tale, (Fanshawe College), ABD with Mark the C (Threshold Theatre), All's Well That Ends Well (Alchemy), Child Hood (Summerworks), Twelfth Night, Therac 25 (Direct Flight Theatre). 

Cost is only $150, payable by etransfer to humebaugh@yahoo.ca upon acceptance into class, first come first served.

THIS IS A GREAT CLASS! Hume really knows his stuff! - Charlotte Moore

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors wanting to level up their craft and career?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Clint Eastwood’s Jersey Boys and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit show Once Upon a Time.

I’m currently opening a limited number of spots for 1:1 coaching sessions for adult actors.

These sessions are ideal for actors who want focused support with accents (Standard American, RP British), audition preparation, and refining their technique.

Sessions run for 1 hour via Zoom and can include:

• Accent coaching (American, RP, and more)
• Audition preparation for film, television, and self-tapes
• Script analysis and character work
• Self-tape technique and performance adjustments

These are tailored one-on-one sessions, so we can focus on what you need - whether that’s general skill development or preparing for an upcoming audition.

I also offer a career coaching and mentorship program for actors looking for guidance in navigating the industry.

Feel free to send me a message for more details or to book a spot.

Hi, my name is Megan Jenkins, and my partner is called Oscar Smith we are both looking for a young actor ages 16-17(a boy) who are local to Manchester to play a role in our student film.

We will be filming from the 28th-20th may 

We will be paying for food and transport.

Logline- When a quiet high‑school girl is found dead, her former friend haunted by their broken relationship joins the lead investigator to uncover the truth, only to reveal the terrifying murder that had happened.

The role

Liam: Liam is tall and brunette, Liam speaks with confidence and has a very big ego, when speaking to Emily he is excited and can let the confident facade fall he’s happy and giggly.

If you would like to audition or want more details, please email [meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com](mailto:meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com) and I will send you a section of the script.

Kind regards, Megan and Oscar

items.text: CAST and CREW call for Cooper’s Hawk Creations’ film! Produced for Cleveland State University.

sharedPost.text:
CAST and CREW CALL!
[EDIT: 03/14/25, NO LONGER JUST CSU CREW. ALL WELCOME.]

Cooper’s Hawk Cleveland State Universitye Curb,' a student short film for Cleveland State University's film and media arts program. 'The Curb' is about a restaurant owner who unknowingly feeds their patrons human meat supplied through her dates. 

LOCATION: Cleveland, Ohio (Norton)
DATE: March 30th, 2025, 8am-6pm

CAST NEEDED:
⭢ Victoria ← 20-40 years, female. Victoria is the owner and chef for 'The Curb' who recruits dates, only to lead them to slaughter. We're looking for an alluring, feminine individual who specializes in subtly.
⭢ Alex ← 20-40 years, all genders. As Victoria's date, Alex is blissfully unaware of the danger they walked into. They arrive late to the scene, disheveled and awkward. Alex starts off as nervous, but lightens up (with the help of alcohol) as the date goes on.

If casted, you will be paired with someone in your age range. 

CREW NEEDED:
Notably, we are looking for:
⭢ Director of photography / camera operator
⭢ Assistant director
⭢ Gaffer
⭢ Script supervisors
⭢ Set dresser
⭢ Production assistants

Due to this being a student film, it is non-union. Compensation includes a good time, food, and IMDb credit. I will also be submitting this to festivals when the time comes. Thank you for understanding.

For those applying, please email coopershawkcreations@gmail.com. Provide a copy of your resume (for crew) or a demo reel/line read + headshot (for cast).

Submissions are due March 15th.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: PAID SHORT FILM
We are currently casting for a Canada Council / BC Arts Council-funded short film set for production in late May. Details below!

**LOGLINE**: On her final shift at her family’s struggling business, a young woman grapples with mounting guilt as she prepares to leave for university, knowing it will mean leaving her immigrant parents behind.

**PRODUCTION DATES**: Tuesday, May 19th - Sunday, May 24th, 2026

**RATES**: $200 per day

Both **UNION AND NON-UNION** encouraged to submit!

We are looking for the following characters:

**MAMAN** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker.

Maman is a sharp, no-nonsense mother who is practical, blunt, and often unintentionally funny. Beneath it all is someone who has sacrificed deeply and holds everything together, expressing her love through control, criticism, and constant caretaking.

**BABA** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker. Aloof, kind, often in his own world.

Baba is a gentle, soft-spoken man who was once educated and respected but has quietly let that life go. He is polite and peacekeeping, with a quiet dignity shaped by sacrifice, and only pushes back when he has to.

**Please submit your materials to eastvancasting@gmail.com**

Thank you!

items.text:
## **CASTING CALL: BACKGROUND PERFORMERS (PAID* - Non union) 🎬**

We are looking for various background roles for an upcoming vertical production filming in **Richmond** **on April 21st, 2026.**

**❗️Please read the requirements carefully before applying.**
* **POLICE OFFICER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **REPORTER / VINTAGE CROWD:** Male, age: 18+
* **SHAREHOLDER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **BOXER:** Male, age: 20s. Must have an athletic/fit build.
* **REFEREE:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **CEO:** Male, age: 30s 
**HOW TO APPLY:**

Please send me a **Direct Message** on Facebook with the following:
1. The **role** you are applying for.
2. A **recent**, clear photo of yourself.
3. Confirmation that you are free for the **full day** on the 21st of April. (Must have **full-day availability**. While you likely won’t be needed for the entire day, we require a flexible schedule to accommodate production timing.) ***RATE:** $100 for a 5 hours

Thank you!

KAMED STUDIO – POSZUKIWANY POLICJANT 🎬

​Na plan nowego serialu poszukujemy statysty, który wcieli się w rolę młodego policjanta. 
Scenę gramy w malowniczym Milanówku!

​📅 TERMIN: 21 kwietnia
📍 MIEJSCE: Milanówek - dojazd we własnym zakresie (dobry dojazd WKD!)
💰 STAWKA: 120 zł (płatne po planie)

​Kogo szukamy?
​Młodego mężczyzny o aparycji policjanta (atutem będzie krótka, schludna fryzura).
​
​Jak się zgłosić?
​Wyślij SMS pod numer: 731 738 797
​W treści wpisz:
​Imię i nazwisko
​Wiek
​Miejscowość zamieszkania
​
​📸 Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

sharedPost.text:
📣📣CASTING📣📣

Zapraszamy na dwuetapowy casting, z pierwszym etapem online! Szukamy aktorki w wieku 18+ do zagrania w spektaklu - bajce kurdyjskiej na podstawie książki "Opowieści Dengbeżów. Baśnie i bajki kurdyjskie". Mile widziane są umiejętności animacji, gdyż w spektaklu wykorzystamy animację lalką.

Premiera spektaklu jest planowana na początek czerwca, próby do spektaklu w maju w weekendy oraz w trakcie majówki w Zamościu (woj. lubelskie) oraz Kielcach (woj. świętokrzyskie), stąd wymagamy dostępności w tym okresie.

Eksploatację spektaklu planujemy w lato 2026 w trakcie festiwali (m.in. Pol'and'Rock Festiwal w Strefie Warsztatów ASP) dlatego dostępność w czerwcu, lipcu i sierpniu również jest dla nas ważna.

📣📣 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila: fundacjabanina@gmail.com 📣📣

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: 
✅ twoje CV
✅ wizytówkę, w formie linku do YouTube

❗Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 23 kwietnia❗

Casting może się przedłużyć, w przypadku gdy w wyznaczonym czasie nie znajdziemy odpowiedniej osoby.

O zakończeniu castingu poinformujemy na naszych social mediach tj. Facebook i Instagram

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - COLORADO FEATURE FILM**

DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE

*After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.*

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives.

Writer/Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain & Jill Coats

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

Locations: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO

**Roles:**

**Sonia ***Lead*

65-72 / Female

Sonia is a 67 year old free spirit who’s spent the last 30 years or so kicking it around Boulder, Colorado after she graduated from Naropa. She’s a sex positive, free wheeling bohemian, who spent the majority of the early 70s trying to relive the 60s. Lots of acid and counter-cultural literature, Grateful Dead shows and the like, until she became a mom. That’s Sonia’s past though. We meet Sonia in the present day; after the death of her beloved husband, Michael, she has plenty of alone time to look back on her full life before her adult son, Ezra, moves back in. Sonia purports strength and wisdom, but really, she seems to be grieving the loss of youth. As she looks at her mortality squarely, she decides to take things into her own hands, and she sets out to end her own life through Medical Aid in Dying, even though she doesn’t exactly qualify…
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Ezra ***Lead*

30-36 / Male

Ezra is a 34 year old man who – more often than not – has something to say about, well, everything. He has an MFA in Creative Writing & PhD in Postmodern Literature from Denver University, and he’s got a whole bunch of opinions on what makes up a valuable opinion. He’s the kind of guy who’s quick to comment on why a certain book or film is low brow, and he's hellbent on being the smartest guy in the room – even if it’s at the expense of those around him. He’s a “writer” but really, lately, he’s a professor that writes. We meet Ezra at quite the inflection point in his life – his wife has left him, he’s moved back in with his mother (whom he has an irrationally short fuse with) and he’s recently been placed on sabbatical for the upcoming semester. Ezra’s looking for answers, even if he won’t admit it until he absolutely must.
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Hayduke ***Supporting*

65-75 / Male

Hayduke is a 70 year old male. Ex-hippie, Grateful Dead fan, very counter cultural. Strong comedic skills preferred.

* Rate: ~$1,500 Project Flat
* Duration: ~3 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/12 - 7/14

_______________________________________
Thank you for your interest in our project! Please submit here:
[[[https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)

Please keep an eye out for more roles and updates in the coming weeks. Cheers!

items.text:
🎤 Wir suchen DICH!

Für unseren neuen Videopodcast suchen wir eine kleinwüchsige Persönlichkeit mit Charakter – jemand, der locker, witzig und einfach echt ist.

Geplant sind regelmäßige Außendrehs, bei denen wir Leute auf der Straße ansprechen – dafür brauchen wir jemanden, der keine Scheu hat, auf Menschen zuzugehen und dabei für gute Stimmung sorgt 😄

👉 Wichtig ist uns:

- Du bist offen & spontan
- Du hast Humor und nimmst dich selbst nicht zu ernst
- Erfahrung? Nice to have, aber kein Muss

Ob weiblich, männlich oder divers – völlig egal. Hauptsache, du hast Bock drauf!

💡 Aktuell ist das Ganze unentgeltlich, da wir das Projekt komplett selbst aufbauen und noch nichts daran verdienen.

📍 Gedreht wird hauptsächlich im Raum Reutlingen (City, Straße, spontane Spots).

Wenn du denkst „das passt zu mir“ – schreib mir einfach eine PN!

items.text:
Hi zusammen,
wir suchen aktuell noch 5–6 Darsteller für einen Dreh diesen Mittwoch in Düsseldorf. Deshalb wollte ich einfach mal in die Runde fragen, ob jemand von euch Lust hätte, dabei zu sein.

Zum Dreh: Es handelt sich um ein Musikvideo. In der Szene geht es darum, dass mehrere „Politiker“ vor einem modernen Bürogebäude mit einem Künstler interagieren. Das Ganze ist bewusst überspitzt dargestellt – die Politiker stehen quasi Schlange, um bei ihm etwas zu „kaufen“. Wird aber alles so umgesetzt bzw. zensiert, dass nichts Explizites zu sehen ist.

Der Drehaufwand ist gering, maximal ca. 1 Stunde. Gage liegt bei 50 € pro Person.

Da der Aufwand relativ kurz ist, schauen wir aktuell vor allem nach Leuten, die möglichst aus der Nähe kommen, damit sich die Anreise auch lohnt.

Wichtig wäre nur, dass ihr einen Anzug habt.

Falls jemand Zeit und Lust hat, meldet euch gerne! Und wenn ihr noch jemanden kennt, der gut passen könnte, gerne weiterleiten.

Ansonsten wünsche ich euch einen schönen Tag!

topComments.text: Gerne dabei. Nähe Düsseldorf, Anzüge vorhanden.
Sehr gern, bin ab 12.00 in Düsseldorf wenn sie möchten.  Wäre aus Essen gern pn (Ohne anzug leider)

🎭 JOB OPPORTUNITY – BELLY DANCE PERFORMERS
We are currently looking for 6 female belly dancers for contract in China.

📍 Location: Theme park in Henan, China

💃 Position Details:

* Role: Belly Dance Performer
* 5–6 shows per day
* Each performance lasts 15–20 minutes
* Performances in a dynamic theme park environment

📏 Requirements:

* Female dancers
* Maximum age: 33 years old
* Strong belly dance technique and stage presence

📅 Contract & Benefits:

* Duration: 1-year contract
* Start date: as soon as possible
* 4 days off per month
* ✈️ Air tickets
* 🏠 Accommodation provided
* 📄 Work visa

📩 Application:
If you are interested, send me a direct message for more details and application process.

items.text:
Auditions for The Spitfire Grill
Auditions!!!

The Spitfire Grill-The Musical

Music and Book by James Valcq 

Lyrics and Book by Fred Alley

Directed by Ella Wyatt

Monday, April 27 @ 7pm

Callbacks: by invitation Wednesday, April 29 @ 7pm

Synopsis:

The musical depicts the journey of a young woman just released from prison, who decides to start her life anew in a rural town in Wisconsin. She participates in a journey within the town toward its own tenuous reawakening.

Please prepare a song of your choice, an accompanist will be provided. 32 bars

Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.

Cold reading sides will be provided at auditions.

Performances: July 10 to August 2, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm

Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees July 18 and August 1 at 2:00pm

Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente

Mon–Thurs, 7:00pm, with some Saturdays

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

(Tech/Dress Rehearsal week rehearsals may be extended.)

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.

There is a $100 stipend offered

Character Breakdown can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaUN0c1JhV29JMUFpUWN1NXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5u2s8JPZvLnjKtydEhs6BkHxK8l8k9R3IXSoE2NwpyZkIXOADty48E_oY5Nw_aem_5edgXDemxfi2rbHAIpzVEQ)

This Sunday 26th April.

sharedPost.text:
EXCLUSIVE Free Acting Training with Michael Keogh (@instakeogh) of Peaky Blinders, BBC Casualty and Marvel’s Secret Invasion.

If you want to know:

✅ What casting directors want
✅The key factor to absolutely nail your self-tape
✅ Exactly what to do if you can’t cry or react the way you want to on cue 
✅ The single reason why you aren’t booking the roles you want (it’s something 99% of actors miss)

This class is for YOU.

Sunday 26th April — you’ll also get a $97 free gift for attending.

RSVP at the link below to reserve your place on our Exclusive Free Masterclass

https://bit.ly/4pCzU5V

#actor #actress #actingcoach #nycactor #britishactor

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m an LACC costume design student and I’m writing a research paper on how it feels to be in a costume fitting for both actors and costumers 
If you have 5 minutes to fill out this survey (fully anonymous), that would help my research greatly! 📝

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1kiMgJ1_N9A9c1id9MkOI5nDhl3I5HJpsJHAEqWETPcI/edit?usp=drivesdk

Please share it with other actors you know 🙏🏼
items.previewDescription: This anonymous survey explores actors’ experiences during costume fittings, including comfort, communication, and emotional responses. Your responses will be used for academic research in costume design and performance studies. Some questions relate to personal comfort. You may skip any question y...
items.title: Actor Experience in Costume Fittings
