items.text:
Hey guys! New update regarding Lobo Oscuro; a short film that I’m acting in! Please read through the details carefully! No need to DM me!

CASTING CALL – Lobo Oscuro  (Short Film)

We are currently casting for an upcoming short film Lobo Oscuro, shooting near the Lake District (UK). All roles are paid, with travel, accommodation, and catering provided, plus IMDb credit.

Roles Available:

Adolpha

- Playing age: 25–29
- Height: 5’2”–5’5”
- Build: Slim
- Appearance: Tanned complexion, dark hair, brown eyes

Feroz

- Playing age: 25–29
- Height: 6ft+
- Build: Athletic
- Appearance: Long hair, facial hair

Crew Needed:

Camera Operator

- Experience operating professional film equipment preferred

Sound Recordist

- Experience with on-location sound recording required

Production Details:

- Project: Short Film
- Shooting Date: TBC
- Location: Near the Lake District, UK
- Compensation: Paid roles
- Travel, accommodation, and meals provided
- IMDb credit included

If interested, please submit your details, headshots (for cast), CV/portfolio (for crew), and availability via DM to Damien Lanceley!

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
NOW CASTING:
New short film project “Unforgettable.”

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m an LACC costume design student and I’m writing a research paper on how it feels to be in a costume fitting for both actors and costumers 
If you have 5 minutes to fill out this survey (fully anonymous), that would help my research greatly! 📝

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1kiMgJ1_N9A9c1id9MkOI5nDhl3I5HJpsJHAEqWETPcI/edit?usp=drivesdk

Please share it with other actors you know 🙏🏼
items.previewDescription: This anonymous survey explores actors’ experiences during costume fittings, including comfort, communication, and emotional responses. Your responses will be used for academic research in costume design and performance studies. Some questions relate to personal comfort. You may skip any question y...

items.text:
Jeg kan ikke holde op med at lave sandwichbrød! Ingen æltning, ingen æg, intet smør! Så bløde og lækre, at mine kolleger bliver ved med at bede mig om at piske dem sammen! 
Dette enkle sandwichbrød er let, luftigt og perfekt til ethvert måltid. Med blot et par enkle ingredienser har du frisk, hjemmelavet brød uden besværet!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig
items.title: Opskrift på sandwich uden æltning: Enkel, blød og luftig – Serpin Recipes

items.summary:
Jeg kan ikke holde op med at lave sandwichbrød! Ingen æltning, ingen æg, intet smør! Så bløde og lækre, at mine kolleger bliver ved med at bede mig om at piske dem sammen! 
Dette enkle sandwichbrød er let, luftigt og perfekt til ethvert måltid. Med blot et par enkle ingredienser har du frisk, hjemmelavet brød uden besværet!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig

CASTING CALL: SPRINTERS – CAPE TOWN

Uncover Talent is looking for experienced 200m - 400m SPRINTERS for an upcoming PAID FEATURE FILM this week.

Requirements:
• Girls, Ages 18 - 25
• Experience 200m - 400m sprinters

Location: Cape Town
Shoot dates: June - September 2026

📧 To Apply:
Send an email to uncovertalent.capetown@gmail.com with:
• Your Full Name
• Date of Birth
• Contact number
• Sprinting footage or showreel

Shortlisted athletes will be contacted with further details.
Tag a athlete who should see this! ✨

#sprinters #featurefilm #capetown #sport
